Body.Content:
Start a chat with anyone who has an email address, even if they're not on Teams! They'll receive an email inviting them to join your chat session as a guest. You'll be able to chat, share files, and start calls all within Teams! We will be releasing to GA at a later date. We apologize for any inconvenience.

GA date: May CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Chat with anyone who has an email address
